  1. Home
  2. Disclaimer

Disclaimer

Last updated: May 2026

This calculator provides estimates based on industry-standard formulas and data. Actual sod, seed, and material requirements may vary based on site conditions, supplier specifications, and installation methods.

Always verify quantities with your local supplier before purchasing. TurfCalculator is not responsible for over- or under-purchasing resulting from these calculations.

Price Estimates

Price estimates are ranges only, not quotes. Actual prices vary by region, supplier, grass type, quantity, and season. Contact local suppliers for current pricing.

Grass Type Recommendations

Grass type information is general guidance based on typical conditions, not professional advice. Local climate, soil conditions, and microclimates may affect grass performance. Consult a local lawn care professional for specific recommendations.

Lawn Care Calendar

The lawn care calendar is based on typical conditions and general guidelines. Actual timing may vary based on your local climate, weather patterns, and specific lawn conditions. Adjust timing based on your local extension service recommendations.

Professional Advice

Results from our calculators should not replace consultation with a qualified lawn care professional. For complex projects, soil testing, or pest problems, consult a local expert.

Privacy Terms Disclaimer Cookies

© 2026 TurfCalculator. Free lawn calculators for everyone.
